options.name: --config
options.description: Specify the rule sets and rule settings. Default is 'rules.xml'.

options.name: --set
options.description: Specify a rule set from configfile. Default is 'default'.

options.name: --log
options.description: Save the report to the specified file.

options.name: --xml
options.description: Save the report, as XML, to the specified file.

options.name: --html
options.description: Save the report, as HTML, to the specified file.

options.name: --ignore
options.description: Do not report defects listed in the specified file.

options.name: --limit
options.description: Stop reporting after N defects are found.

options.name: --severity
options.description:
Filter defects for the specified severity levels.
Default is 'medium+'

options.name: --confidence
options.description:
Filter defects for the specified confidence levels.
Default is 'normal+'

options.name: --console
options.description: Show defects on the console even if --log, --xml or --html are specified.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Used to disable progress and other information which is normally written to stdout.

options.name: --v
options.description: When present additional progress information is written to stdout (can be used multiple times).
